input: To Whom It May Concern: Our organization subscribed to your enterprise tier on January 3rd. The API access promised in the contract has not been provisioned as of February 22nd — seven weeks overdue. We require a formal written explanation and a binding remediation timeline by end of week.
response: Dear Customer, we apologize for the API provisioning delay. Our engineering team is prioritizing your account and expects full access to be live by end of this week. We will send a formal summary of the issue by February 24th. Enterprise Support.
